KioniteBattery_Tooltip: Battery enhanced with kyanicphur for additional energy capacity. Inedible.
KionitePowerCell_Tooltip: Power cell enhanced with kyanicphur for additional energy capacity. Inedible.
Kyanicphur_Tooltip: AlNiSiO₅S. Alloy of Sulphur, Nickel, Kyanite. Used in advanced modification.
